name: European Collectivity of Alsace
description: A red field crossed diagonally by a white band (bend) edged with white trefoil-like lobes; in the upper fly two yellow crowns and in the lower hoist three yellow crowns.
history: The flag combines the white bend of Lower Alsace with the crowns of Upper Alsace, uniting the two former departments into the European Collectivity of Alsace in 2021.
